programs.program_course_name: Bachelor of Applied Arts (BAA) Digital Media - Level 7
programs.academic_requirements: You must be over 18 years of age and hold a National Certificate of Educational Achievement (NCEA) 3 or equivalent.
programs.india_qualification: Indian equivalent: You must be over 18 years of age and hold a National Certificate of Educational Achievement (NCEA) 3 or equivalent.. Indian students should provide transcripts from a recognised Indian university or board (CBSE/ICSE/State board) showing the equivalent standard.
